steps.title: Locate the main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main verb is begins. The blank appears in a phrase set off by commas between the subject and that main verb.

steps.title: Use a modifier form
steps.content: Choice A, Choice B, and Choice C are finite verb forms, so each would create a second main verb for the same subject. A present participle forms a descriptive phrase that modifies the author while leaving begins as the main verb. The answer is D.
